title: ototropis conferta
side_effects: Ototropis conferta can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In rare cases, improper use of ototropis conferta may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using ototropis conferta for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
